summary: Verified the 'Espace Client / Connexion' nav button visibility fix on EuroKredit homepage. All 6 requested scenarios passed on both desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px). Login, register, dashboard, application detail (5 steps), and logout flows all work end-to-end. Only one minor UX observation.

tests_executed.details: Visible with User icon + 'CONNEXION' text, href=/login
Redirects to /client, dashboard renders, 1 application row visible
Visible with User icon + 'ESPACE CLIENT' text, href=/client, nav-signin-button removed
5 step labels rendered (Demande soumise, En cours d'examen, Pré-accord obtenu, Contrat envoyé, Fonds décaissés)
Icon-only (40x40) visible top-right; text span hidden via 'hidden sm:inline' as intended

tests_executed.scenario: After logout, nav-signin-button visible again on /
tests_executed.details: user cleared, space-button count=0, signin-button visible=true

action_items: MINOR (optional): After clicking dashboard-logout, ClientDashboard.doLogout calls navigate('/', { replace: true }) but the browser ends up on /login (likely a ProtectedRoute race — setUser(null) re-renders and redirects to /login before navigate('/') completes). Functionally OK (nav-signin-button visible on both /login and when user navigates to /), but UX intent was to land on the homepage.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav.jsx conditional render is clean; button correctly toggles between nav-signin-button and nav-space-button based on user state.
The 'hidden sm:inline' on the label span (Nav.jsx L124, L133) correctly shows icon-only on mobile (<640px) and icon+label on ≥sm. Fix is correctly implemented as described.
AuthContext uses axios.defaults.withCredentials=true + explicit withCredentials on each call — httpOnly cookie flow verified working (login → /api/auth/me → dashboard data load all succeed).
test_credentials: Used client.test@eurokredit.fr / Client2026! from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created one registration test user test.reg.<timestamp>@eurokredit.fr during flow verification (not cleaned up — low volume).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nav visibility fix (data-testid='nav-signin-button' / 'nav-space-button') verified across desktop + mobile viewports. Login/register/logout/dashboard/application-detail flows are all functional against https://credit-easy-2.preview.emergentagent.com. The only observation is a minor logout redirect behavior (lands on /login instead of /) — not blocking.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — testing task, no bugs found. The reported 'J'ai pas vue l'accès client' issue is fully resolved: nav-signin-button and nav-space-button are both visible at all breakpoints (icon-only on mobile, icon+text on sm+).
